task_completion.description: Agent identifies the locations of Tower Bridge and Westminster Bridge.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Browser showing a map centered on London, search results for coordinates of Tower Bridge and Westminster Bridge, or a script defining these specific coordinates.

task_completion.description: Agent generates or selects coordinates tracing the River Thames.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A map interface showing a line or points being drawn along the river curve, or a text editor/script where multiple coordinate pairs (lat ~51.50, lon between -0.07 and -0.12) are being entered.

task_completion.description: The path consists of at least 8 waypoints to ensure curve adherence.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Visual count of markers on a map is 8 or more, or a list of coordinate tuples in code/text file has at least 8 entries.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the file as thames_path.kml in the Documents directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File explorer showing 'thames_path.kml' inside '~/Documents', a 'Save As' dialog targeting this folder, or a terminal command verifying the file's existence there.

task_completion.description: The final KML file contains valid XML structure and correct coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file 'thames_path.kml' is opened in a text editor or viewer. Look for KML tags (e.g., <LineString>, <coordinates>) and latitude values approx 51.50xx.

integrity.description: Agent did not download a pre-made KML file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Agent does not use terminal commands like wget or curl to download a file from a URL, nor downloads a file named 'thames_path.kml' directly from a web search result.

integrity.description: Agent generated the data through interaction or calculation, not copy-paste.
integrity.visual_evidence: Agent is seen selecting points on a map or writing code/coordinates. Agent does not instantly paste a large block of formatted KML text into a file.

integrity.description: Agent used appropriate tools for the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Agent interacts with a map interface, a text editor, or an IDE. The file is not generated purely via opaque shell redirection without visible data sourcing.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Tower Bridge is at latitude 51.5055. Westminster Bridge is at latitude 51.5008. The Thames corridor northern boundary is 51.515. The generated path coordinates must fall within these latitude bounds and follow the river.
